title: Capsicodendron dinisii
taxonomy: Capsicodendron dinisii is classified as a species within the family Buxaceae. It belongs to the genus Capsicodendron and is a type of flowering plant. The family Buxaceae is a small group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions. Capsicodendron dinisii is native to Africa and is one of the few species within its genus. This plant is relatively rare and is not widely studied or recognized outside of botanical circles.
